questionHtml: Avocados are known to be a good source of dietary fibre and contain all the essential amino acids. State one health benefit of a diet high in fibre.
markschemeHtml:
helps in movement of food along alimentary canal/peristalsis/decreases transit time
OR
regulates bowel action
OR
prevents cancer/constipation/heart attack ✔

meta.title: Avocados are known to be a good source of dietary fibre and contain all the essential amino acids. State one health benefit of a diet high in fibre.
